---
title: "Practice Activity Week 4"
format: html
embed-resources: true
editor: source
execute: 
  echo: true
  error: true
---

```{r}
#| label: packages-setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
```

## Accessing the Practice Activity

Download the template Practice Activity Quarto file here: <a href="student/pa-4.qmd" download>`pa-4.qmd`</a>

::: {.callout-important}
Be sure to save the file inside your Week 2 folder of your STAT 431 (or 541) folder! 
:::

<!-- Simple ggplot extensions -->
<!-- ggridges -->
<!-- heatmaps -->
<!-- ribbon -->
<!-- Remove your legend -->
<!-- Annotations -->
<!-- Colors in titles -->
<!-- Colors & themes -->
<!-- Linear regression analysis -->
<!-- broom -->
<!-- gt -->
